/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -shared  -o ../python/urdf_approx_geom.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/urdf_approx_geom.dir/urdf_approx_geom.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/build:/workspace/build/third_party/ManifoldPlus:/workspace/build/bot_utils/sphereTreeWrapper ../libURDFApproxGeom.so ../third_party/ManifoldPlus/libManifoldPlus.so.1.4 ../bot_utils/sphereTreeWrapper/libsphereTreeWrapper.so.1.4 ../third_party/sphere_tree/libSTG.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/API/libAPI.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/API/SFWhite/libSFWhite.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/BBox/libBBox.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/BBox/MVBB/libMVBB.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/BBox/qHull/libqHull.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/Exceptions/libExceptions.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/MedialAxis/libMedialAxis.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/MinMax/libMinMax.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/SphereTree/libSphereTree.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/Surface/libSurface.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/Base/libBase.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/Geometry/libGeometry.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/Geometry/pcube/libpcube.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/LinearAlgebra/libMatrix.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/Storage/libStorage.a ../third_party/sphere_tree/src/Export/libExport.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.7.0 /usr/lib/libirmv_core.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 -Wl,--as-needed -luv -lgmp -ltinyxml2 -lurdfdom_model -lurdfdom_world -lurdfdom_sensor
